title: The Rem
description: This Mod Adds A Spooky Character That is supposedly named The REM
body:
![ ](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/f89da309bdcd433d233b21a196099448133bea41.png)

Story
-----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
While Walking in a Forest you see a Black Figure but then Disappers. Seconds Later He Spawns Behind You AND ELEMINATES YOU.!

If You want to play/download a scary mod (recommended to play with other scary mods) you can now, this will be getting updates and more! Also Adds a feature that if you right-click on Glitch Sword or Axe it will shoot a fireball! (when you shoot the fireball you have to hit it to get it going!)

This Mod Adds
--------------------------                                                                       
-The Rem (Main Subject)                                                                               
-Glitch Ore                                                                                     
-Glitch Ingot          
-Glitch Sword                                                                                         
Etc.
